chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4421 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "مَنْ كَانَ يَدِينُ بِدِينِ قَوْمٍ لَزِمَتْهُ أَحْكَامُهُمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4421 - And Imam (as) said: "Whoever follows the religion of a people is bound by their rulings."
